no: Component 0 works standalone or EET. Component 1 (rescue in ToB) requires EET. Has Longer Road compatibility built in.

conflicts.reason: Both mods modify Caelars storyline. LCA website explicitly lists Shine on Caelar as incompatible.
Reverse of LCC-docs incompatibility (lcc id 948 vs 1475)

sum: Lets you side with Caelar in SoD for a peaceful resolution, then rescue her from Avernus in ToB as an EET companion.

co.no: mod_installer: game detection fails — FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME ~bdcaelar.cre~ (tp2 line 17) requires SoD resources merged by EET. bdcaelar.cre does not exist until EET_Start merges SoD content. Fix: install after EET_Start on BG2EE executable (SoD phase). No missing GAME_IS check — this is purely a resource dependency on EET-merged SoD content.
Note: REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~ eet~ (line 38) has a leading space in the game identifier string (~ eet~) — verify this does not cause detection failure on some WeiDU versions.
